case_title: GUSTAVE LINK VS. ARKADY PLETMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-30-2018 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINK, GUSTAVE AS TO DEFENDANT PLETMAN, ARKADY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-30-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-26-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-07-2018

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62073359), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINK, GUSTAVE SERVED FEB-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-16-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT PLETMAN, ARKADY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 62235421) AS TO DEFENDANT PLETMAN, ARKADY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-22-2018 CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100049872)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-11-2018 CONTINUED TO AUG-22-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
